---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new workflow, agent, or plugin for OmniClaw
title: '[FEATURE] '
labels: enhancement, new-feature
assignees: ''
---

**Feature Objective**
What problem does this feature solve? Which OmniClaw process is currently lacking?

**Proposed Architecture**
Which Department does this feature belong to? (e.g., Dept 10, Dept 20...)
If the feature requires external data intake, please describe the integration architecture.
Will it be implemented via a Plugin (Tier 1/2), Tool, or Subagent?

**Alternatives**
Are you currently solving this problem manually or with an external script? What is it specifically?

**Additional Context**
Constraints (e.g., does it require the internet, does it touch sensitive areas of the system).
